sources.title: Sales BDC Performance Metrics: KPIs That Drive Revenue | Strolid
sources.excerpt: The difference between a 30% appointment-to-sale rate and 40% rate is $300,000-$500,000 in annual gross profit for a typical dealership.

sources.title: BDC KPIs That Matter: 15 Metrics to Track Daily | Strolid | Strolid
sources.excerpt: ROI appears quickly - a $600 monthly technology investment that improves appointment rate by 5 percentage points generates $15,000-$25,000 additional annual gross profit.
sources.relevance_reason: Used by UltraPlan as research-only competitor topic signal src_002 for sales-bdc-performance-metrics-kpis-that-matter; not intended as a published outbound citation.
